channel.title: OCS OORJA Blog
channel.description: OCS OORJA is a trusted Indian manufacturer of hybrid solar inverters, LiFePO₄ batteries, and EV charging solutions, based in Lucknow (Uttar Pradesh). We design and supply dependable, factory-direct power systems for solar energy storage, e-mobility, telecom, and industrial applications across India.

item.title: Hybrid Solar Inverter Guide: Everything You Need to Know for Indian Homes & Businesses
item.description: How hybrid solar inverters work, how to size and choose one, installation, maintenance, costs and government subsidies — explained by our engineers.

item.title: Delhi EV Policy 2026: Why the Shift to Electric Vehicles Is No Longer Optional
item.description: Delhi's new EV policy, the road from BS6 to E20, and why consumers, businesses and fleet operators should plan their electric transition now.

item.title: How Much Can a Home Solar + Battery System Save on Electricity Bills?
item.description: Learn how a rooftop solar system with LiFePO₄ battery storage can reduce household electricity bills by up to 90%.

item.title: How to Size a Hybrid Solar Inverter for Indian Homes
item.description: A practical guide to matching inverter capacity, solar array size and battery bank for reliable day-and-night backup.

item.title: Why LiFePO₄ Batteries Outlast Lead-Acid in Real Duty Cycles
item.description: Cycle life, depth of discharge, safety and total cost of ownership — how lithium iron phosphate compares for solar and backup.

item.title: AC vs DC EV Charging: Choosing the Right Setup
item.description: Understand charging speeds, site requirements and use-cases to pick between AC and DC fast charging for your fleet or facility.
